query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content_fingerprint IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_fingerprint,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content_fingerprint IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_fingerprint,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN content_fingerprint IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_fingerprinted
FROM ad_performance;
